---
title: "Modular Api First"
---

---
title: "Modular & API-First"
source: "https://support.hyland.com/r/Current/Content-Intelligence-Architecture/sly1744717394283"
section: "Content Intelligence Architecture"
---

Every Content Intelligence component is modular and exposes its own API.

![](data:image/png;base64,)
This allows selective adoption and agile development.
